parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'email', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.email }] }], properties: ['firstname','lastname','email','company','icp_score','score_tier'], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: 'C0B70CSUJ0Y', text: '🔄 *Returning Lead — Applied Again*

*' + $('Prepare Lead Data').item.json.fullName + '* from *' + $('Prepare Lead Data').item.json.company + '*
Email: ' + $('Prepare Lead Data').item.json.email + '
Role: ' + $('Prepare Lead Data').item.json.role + '

*Their challenge:* "' + $('Prepare Lead Data').item.json.challenge + '"

_This contact already exists in HubSpot. Please check and update the record._' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { firstname: $json.firstName, lastname: $json.lastName, email: $json.email, company: $json.company, jobtitle: $json.role, icp_score: String($json.weighted_total), score_tier: $json.tier, marketing_challenge: $json.challenge, pre_call_brief_url: 'Generated — see notes', enrichment_status: $json.apollo_success ? 'Enriched via Apollo' : 'Manual enrichment needed', hs_lead_status: 'NEW' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { dealname: 'Strategy Session — ' + $json.company, dealstage: 'appointmentscheduled', pipeline: 'default', description: 'ICP Score: ' + $json.weighted_total + '/10 (' + $json.tier + ')\nRole: ' + $json.role + '\nChallenge: ' + $json.challenge, hs_priority: $json.tier === 'Hot' ? 'high' : $json.tier === 'Warm' ? 'medium' : 'low' } }) }}
